=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (12:35-12:44) TS377088: This generator applies the same trailing `Effect.mapError(...)` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once at the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.mapError(...))`, or the trailing pipe arguments of generator-form `Effect.fn(...)`. effect(redundantMapError)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantMapError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantMapError for entire file"
